prompt: Add real-time notifications when someone replies in the community.
method: constitution-bound expand simulation (same packs/contracts/evidence as forge expand-node; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)

nodes.label: SSE or WS transport
nodes.details: Choose transport for reply events; document reconnect + backoff failure modes.

nodes.label: Notification persistence
nodes.details: Persist notifications in postgres with read/unread; support inbox fetch without relying on live socket.

nodes.label: Reply fan-out job
nodes.details: Fan-out on reply create; idempotent delivery keys to prevent duplicate alerts.

nodes.label: Preference flags API
nodes.details: User prefs must encode quiet mode defaults per product decision.
nodes.strategicAnswer: Prefer quiet belonging over engagement spam.

nodes.label: Inbox-first ship slice
nodes.details: Smallest slice: persist + inbox poll; realtime transport can follow.
